summary: Matched three trophy/toy functions and partially improved one more in the ty subsystem. The slice replaces several M2C/raw access patterns with a recovered TyModeState struct, adds local temporary tyfigupon structs for field access, types one archive global as HSD_Archive*, and adjusts symbol metadata for ty data strings used by lbArchive_LoadSymbols.

key_files.role: Implements un_80306D14, un_803102D0, and un_80312018_OnFrame; adds archive externs and uses TyModeState for state field access.
Implements fn_80315574 using recovered local struct layouts TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner.
Switches two OnFrame functions from M2C_FIELD state access to TyModeState.x4 and includes ty/types.h; adds unmatched function stubs/comments.
Adds TyModeState struct used by toy.c and tydisplay.c.
Splits un_803FE678 size and names three ty string symbols used by un_803102D0.
Adds extern declarations for ty data string symbols and minor prototype cleanup.
Types un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive* and adjusts baselib include from gobj.h to forward.h.

what_changed: un_80306D14 was decompiled as a TyModeState-based audio trigger: state->x0 values 1 and 2 call lbAudioAx_800237A8 with sound IDs 0xAA and 0xAB.
un_80312018_OnFrame was decompiled as a state->x4 guard that calls un_80311F5C and gm_801A4B60.
fn_80315574 was decompiled using local TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner layouts: it either sets inner->x4D, clears data->x10, and calls HSD_GObjProc_8038FE24, or decrements data->x24.
un_803102D0 was improved but not fully matched: it lazy-loads symbols via lbArchive_LoadSymbols when un_804D6ECC is NULL.
TyModeState was added to src/melee/ty/types.h and reused to replace M2C_FIELD access to un_804A284C in toy and tydisplay code.
String symbols str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl were added in symbols.txt and declared in toy.h.
un_804D6ECC was typed as HSD_Archive* in toy.c and tylist.c.
Header prototype edits removed parameter names from several declarations without changing signatures.

smart_moves.text: The author explicitly paused to clean up pointer arithmetic and try to extract a struct, and the diff shows that cleanup materialized as TyModeState replacing M2C_FIELD accesses in multiple files.
The partial match for un_803102D0 was paired with symbol metadata and header declarations for the strings it uses, instead of leaving the call with anonymous addresses.
Typing un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive* made the archive-load result type explicit where the global is used.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When multiple functions access the same global state object by raw offset, recovering a small shared struct can both improve readability and support matching progress.
For data-loading functions, symbol-table splits and typed extern declarations may be needed alongside code changes when the decompiled call references named string data.

naming_conventions.name: TyModeState
naming_conventions.observation: Introduced in ty/types.h for the global mode state accessed through un_804A284C; field names remain offset-style x0, x4, etc.

naming_conventions.name: TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner
naming_conventions.observation: Temporary or partial struct names were introduced in tyfigupon.c with offset-style fields and padding, preserving uncertainty about field semantics.

naming_conventions.name: str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, str_tyModelFileUsTbl
naming_conventions.observation: Named string symbols were added at 0x803FE770, 0x803FE77C, and 0x803FE78C and declared in toy.h for use in lbArchive_LoadSymbols.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover typed state access before finalizing matching C.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR changed raw M2C_FIELD reads of un_804A284C offset 4 into TyModeState* state and state->x4 accesses, and the author comment says they were cleaning pointer arithmetic and maybe pulling out a struct.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use partial local structs with padding and offset-style fields when enough layout is known to replace raw pointer arithmetic but semantic field names are not proven.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: fn_80315574 uses TyFiguponData with x10, x18, x24 and TyFiguponInner with x4D rather than raw byte offsets.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Pair function matching with narrow score evidence from the PR report.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The bot report records three new 100% matches and one improvement for un_803102D0 from 0.00% to 72.38%.

review_feedback.text: Author said they were switching to draft while cleaning pointer arithmetic and maybe trying to pull a struct out.
No review comments or formal reviewer feedback are present in the loaded slice.

notes: The loaded diff is complete and directly supports changed-file and code-change claims.
The PR body and bot report support match percentages for un_80306D14, fn_80315574, un_80312018_OnFrame, and un_803102D0.
There are no loaded review comments; reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
The evidence supports that un_803102D0 improved to 72.38%, not that it fully matched.
Struct field semantics are not proven beyond offset-style names in the diff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover shared structs to replace repeated pointer arithmetic
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2051 shows a ty subsystem case where raw/M2C access to a shared state global was cleaned by introducing TyModeState and using typed fields in multiple functions, after the author explicitly noted pointer-arithmetic cleanup and struct extraction.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Partial structs can be preferable to raw offsets when semantics remain unknown
accepted_candidate_records.text: fn_80315574 uses local padded structs with offset-style fields, improving typed access while avoiding invented semantic field names.

source_update_candidates.title: ty subsystem has shared TyModeState for un_804A284C
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2051 added TyModeState in src/melee/ty/types.h and used it to access un_804A284C fields x0 and x4 in toy.c and tydisplay.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential durable path fact about recovered ty global state layout; curator should verify against current source before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: ty archive global un_804D6ECC typed as HSD_Archive*
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2051 changed un_804D6ECC from void* to HSD_Archive* in tylist.c and declared it as HSD_Archive* in toy.c where it receives lbArchive_LoadSymbols.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential durable typing fact for a ty global; curator should verify current declaration ownership and current source.

source_update_candidates.title: ty data string symbols added around 0x803FE770
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2051 split un_803FE678 and added str_TyDataf_dat at 0x803FE770, str_tyModelFileTbl at 0x803FE77C, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl at 0x803FE78C in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible data-sheet update for string symbol ownership; should be checked against current symbol metadata and data-section ownership.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the TyFiguponData or TyFiguponInner field meanings beyond x10, x18, x24, and x4D; the PR uses offset-style names and does not prove semantics.
Do not record un_803102D0 as matched; both PR body and bot report say it improved only to 72.38%.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; the loaded slice has no review comments.
